calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Cathy, daughter of the petitioner appearing to help her parents to establish the fact of marriage. Her parents are also in court. They did not get a marriage license 30 years ago. Petition is denied. Court advised them to get a lawyer.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
